tasks.title: Categories tab — browse + trends by category
tasks.description: New /categories page: pick a focus-area category and see its feed across all competitors plus volume/momentum over time.
tasks.details: Frontend CategoriesPage + route + nav (nav link already present). Reuse GET /api/pages?category=&relevant=true for the feed and GET /api/analytics/activity (per-category series) for the trend. Lightweight inline bar chart (no charting dep). Category color map from db.ts.
tasks.testStrategy: Load /categories, switch categories, confirm feed + trend reflect /api/pages and /api/analytics/activity for that category.

tasks.title: Competitors tab — recent high-relevance activity
tasks.description: Per-competitor overview of newest high-relevance (score >= 70) new_product/new_feature items, with counts and momentum.
tasks.details: Backend GET /api/competitors/overview returning per-competitor recent high-score items + counts. Frontend CompetitorsPage top half. Links into the Feed.
tasks.testStrategy: Load /competitors; each competitor shows its recent score>=70 items matching the DB.

tasks.title: Telnyx offerings catalog + offering_comparisons schema & API
tasks.description: Data model + endpoints for the competitor-vs-Telnyx offering map. Catalog seeded later from an internal de facto list.
tasks.details: Prisma: telnyx_offerings (name, category, description) and offering_comparisons (competitorId, focusArea, competitorProductId?, telnyxOfferingId?, verdict, rationale, source, editedBy). CRUD endpoints. Empty-catalog-aware (UI shows an enable-when-populated state).
tasks.testStrategy: Create/list/patch offerings and comparisons via curl; empty catalog returns a clean empty state.

tasks.title: Competitor↔Telnyx offering map UI (editable matrix)
tasks.description: Bottom half of the Competitors tab: a per-competitor matrix of products vs Telnyx offerings with parity verdicts, operator-editable.
tasks.details: Matrix by focus area; edit verdict/counterpart/notes; edits override generated values. Admin-gate later.
tasks.testStrategy: With offerings present, render and edit a comparison; edit persists and is flagged source=manual.

tasks.title: Inference generation of offering comparisons
tasks.description: Generate each competitor product's Telnyx counterpart + parity verdict via the inference layer.
tasks.details: Prompt the inference layer with competitor products + Telnyx offerings to propose verdicts/rationale; store source=inference; operator edits override.
tasks.testStrategy: Run generation for one competitor; comparisons populated with rationale; re-run does not clobber manual edits.

tasks.title: Ops console completion + auth/role gating
tasks.description: Finish run-history/health/error surfacing UI and introduce the admin role boundary (approvals, Telnyx-map edits, classification overrides).
tasks.details: Auth provider (Telnyx SSO or gateway); gate admin actions; enforce requestedBy/resolvedBy on approvals.
tasks.testStrategy: Non-admin blocked from approve/edit; admin allowed.

tasks.title: Slack deep links + delivery status
tasks.description: Add View-in-dashboard deep links to Slack digest blocks and surface delivery status in the dashboard.
tasks.details: Per-run and per-item links; show sent/failed/channel.
tasks.testStrategy: Digest links resolve to run/item views; status shown.

tasks.title: Automations (Training D) consuming relevance_score
tasks.description: Downstream actions gated on confidence — e.g. alert/ticket on high-confidence new products; route uncertain items to the training queue.
tasks.details: Confidence-gated triggers on relevance_score >= threshold + matching rules; uncertain -> queue.
tasks.testStrategy: High-confidence new_product fires the action; borderline routes to queue, not the action.

metadata.description: Planned items from docs/dashboard_prd.md (post Phase-1 + Training A-C).
